name: End of War 1945
short_description: End of War 1945 is a WW2 FPS focusing on 6v6 classic casual gameplay (Support for up to 32 players), intense action, open and unique maps, and a historically authentic setting. The Early Access release is set in Germany, Yugoslavia, and Italy during the final months of the war.
detailed_description:
End of War 1945 is an Early Access multiplayer shooter focusing on classic, dynamic gameplay in unconventional World War 2 settings. Experience non-stop action with up to 32 players, or take on bots in single player.

Key Features:



Up to 32 Player Matches
Intense combat for matches of all sizes.

12 Maps
Unique locations focused on lesser known battles set in Italy, Germany, and Yugoslavia.

3 Nations
Play as Germany, the USA, the United Kingdom, Italy, the Yugoslav Partisans, and more. Each faction has their own arsenal of weapons to choose from.

5 Game Modes
A balance of Deathmatch and nonlinear/linear objective gameplay.

Full Bot Support
Play with AI opponents and teammates on all game modes.

Historical Authenticity
Authentic weapons, uniforms, and historically immersive World War 2 setting.
